message:
feat(core,runtime,render): enhance terminal handling and rendering pipeline

Core (ftui-core):
- input_parser.rs: improve key event parsing with better modifier detection,
  add support for kitty keyboard protocol extended sequences
- terminal_session.rs: add graceful cleanup on session drop

Runtime (ftui-runtime):
- program.rs: improve event loop scheduling with priority queues
- queueing_scheduler.rs: add backpressure handling for high-frequency events
- resize_coalescer.rs: debounce rapid resize events to reduce flicker
- simulator.rs: add deterministic mode for snapshot testing
- terminal_writer.rs: optimize output buffering with adaptive chunk sizes
- lib.rs: re-export commonly used types for ergonomic imports

Render (ftui-render):
- diff.rs: implement smarter diff algorithm with region-based updates
- diff_strategy.rs: add configurable strategies for different terminal caps
- buffer.rs: optimize cell comparisons and reduce allocations
- frame.rs: add frame timing metrics for performance debugging
- presenter.rs: improve cursor positioning with minimal escape sequences
- diff_bench.rs: add benchmarks for diff algorithm variants

Layout & Text:
- ftui-layout: improve flex layout calculations for nested containers
- ftui-text/wrap.rs: handle Unicode grapheme clusters correctly in wrapping

Root:
- ftui/lib.rs: update public API exports

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
